title: podman in rootful mode containers using docker java client cant find images but in rootless mode images are found.
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

When running podman in rootfull mode, a container that uses the Docker Java Client API can not find any images from the docker.io registry. However in rootless mode this works as expected.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. podman machine init --cpus=4 -m=8192 --rootful=true

2. podman machine start

3. podman-compose -f podman-compose.yaml up, unfortunately the content of this yaml file and the containers used are private so cannot be supplied. but in step 4 the simplified java code that executes is provided. 

4. Sample Java code executed in the container

```
DefaultDockerClientConfig.createDefaultConfigBuilder().withDockerHost("unix:////run/user/501/podman/podman.sock")

CreateContainerCmd cmd = dockerClient
                .createContainerCmd("postgres")
                .withName("my_postgres")
```

**Describe the results you received:**
Got an exception: 

com.github.dockerjava.api.exception.NotFoundException: Status 404: {"message":"No such image: ....

**Describe the results you expected:**
Expected the image to be found and the container to be created/running

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

Issue only happens when running in rootfull mode, running in rootless mode images are found and containers created/running, verified that DNS lookups from the container work.

This may not be a bug, but as I can't find any information in the docs to suggest otherwise I am raising it as a bug.

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
podman version 4.1.0
```

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

comments.body: Does pulling images from the Podman CLI work? Is it just a few images that fail, or all of them?

> withDockerHost("unix:////run/user/501/podman/podman.sock")

Do you bind mount the socket into the container? This path is only for rootless. As root you would have to use the rootful socket.

> Does pulling images from the Podman CLI work? Is it just a few images that fail, or all of them?

Yep pulling images from the CLI works

> > withDockerHost("unix:////run/user/501/podman/podman.sock")
> 
> Do you bind mount the socket into the container? This path is only for rootless. As root you would have to use the rootful socket.

Ah, when I go into the podman machine using podman machine ssh, I only see that socket, what is the location of the rootfull socket?
`/run/podman/podman.sock` should be the rootful socket by default

Thanks, that works, just saw that in another logged issue now as well. 

Closing as this is resolved.
